# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [14.x, 16.x]
        python-version: [3.7, 3.8, 3.9]
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}

    - name: Cache node modules
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: ~/.npm
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-node-

    - name: Install node dependencies
      run: npm ci

    - name: Set up Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}

    - name: Cache pip packages and configuration files
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: ~/.cache/pip,${{ secrets.CUSTOM_CONFIG_FILES || '' }}
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ hashFiles('**/pyproject.toml', '**/setup.cfg', '**/*.env') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-python-

    - name: Install pip dependencies
      run: pip install --upgrade setuptools wheel twine
      env:
        CUSTOM_CONFIG_FILES: my_custom_config_file.ini
